label: Drone Shield Antenna Enginner Cover Letter
subject: Application — Senior Mechanical Engineer / Product Developer
paragraphs: I'm a Mechatronics Engineer with a Masters Degree in Biomedical Engineering, a Diploma in Software Development, and a strong focus on product development. I have over eight years of experience designing and engineering medical devices within R&D, orthopaedic, and consulting environments. This includes implant systems, prosthetics, surgical tools, and custom-built manufacturing equipment. I'm an inventor at heart — in my spare time I enjoy creating everything from mechanical tools to smart software.

Across recent roles I've built practical experience with materials selection, supplier collaboration, quality teams, and compliance review. I work to balance functional performance, aesthetics, and regulatory requirements, and I bring a hands-on approach to design, prototyping, and problem solving.

I'm looking for collaborative environments where engineering, user experience, and real-world testing come together. Thank you for considering my application — I'd welcome the chance to discuss how I can contribute to your team.
